summary: Gemini 3.5 Flash GA at Google I/O 2026 — near-Pro coding and reasoning at Flash-tier cost ($1.50/$9.00 per Mtok).

analyst_note.author: Zerg AI
analyst_note.text: The Flash tier keeps absorbing the Pro tier's capabilities one release at a time. At $1.50/$9.00 it is 5x cheaper than Gemini 3.1 Pro on input while claiming near-Pro coding — the same compression dynamic that played out between GPT-5.4 and its mini variant. The practical effect: the 'mid-tier workhorse' price band ($1–3 input) is now the most competitive segment of the market, with Gemini 3.5 Flash, Sonnet 4.6, and Qwen3.7 Max all fighting for the same workloads.
